overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Harry Potter-style game depicting the Great Hall of Hogwarts during lunch. The camera follows a student in Gryffindor robes into the vast candlelit hall, then proceeds down the central aisle between long dining tables filled with eating students.

agents.ego_description: following a Gryffindor student from behind as they enter the Great Hall

notable_agents.action: Gryffindor student walking ahead into the hall wearing black robes with red trim

entered.detail: large stone archway marking the entrance to the Great Hall
hundreds of lit candles floating in mid-air beneath the high ceiling
long wooden dining tables lined with students on the right side
tall grey stone walls with gothic architectural details
tall arched windows letting in natural daylight

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a Gryffindor student entering the Great Hall. The stone archway entrance looms ahead, while floating candles illuminate the space above. Long wooden tables line the right side where students are seated eating.

scene_state.functional_zone: Great Hall central aisle between house tables

events.description: camera shifts from following the student to center aisle perspective, revealing the full length of the hall
game UI text 'Lunch' and '11:00am' appears in the lower left corner indicating the in-game meal time

agents.ego_description: proceeding slowly down the central aisle between the house tables, observing the dining students

notable_agents.action: students sitting at the left house table eating and conversing
students sitting at the right house table eating lunch

entered.detail: red and gold house banner with lion crest hanging from the center table
long wooden dining tables on the left side of the aisle now visible

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to the central aisle of the Great Hall, moving slowly between rows of dining students seated at long wooden tables. The Gryffindor house banner hangs prominently from the nearest table. Floating candles illuminate the high gothic ceiling above while students eat and converse on both sides. The game UI indicates it is 11:00am lunch time.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the threshold of the Great Hall into the heart of its bustling lunch hour. It begins by following a student in Gryffindor robes through a looming stone archway, where floating candles first illuminate the vast space and long wooden tables line the right side. As the camera moves forward, the perspective shifts into the central aisle, gliding slowly between rows of dining students who eat and converse on both sides. The scene then expands to reveal a prominent Gryffindor house banner hanging from a nearby table while the view tilts upward toward the high gothic ceiling. Finally, the movement settles into the rhythmic flow of the hall, with the lighting and atmosphere emphasizing the midday meal.
